'TIS THE SEASON TO BE BUTTERY
BUTTER YELLOW IS HERE

NEW LIMITED-EDITION STAINLESS STEEL

The best way to spread Christmas cheer is gifting Butter Yellow before they disappear.

Take the hassle out of Christmas gifting with this new, limited edition Stainless Steel colourway. Practical without sacrificing fun, the memobottle is the perfect thoughtful gift for those who appreciate something out-of-the-box.

LIMITED-EDITION COLOURWAY

Introducing the Stainless Steel bottle in Butter, that's anything but cookie-cutter.

We're serving up Butter Yellow in all four memobottle sizes — explore the spread now before this limited-edition colourway melts away for good.

DISCOVER BUTTER YELLOW

FORM + FUNCTION

Flat and space-saving design that allows for a Tetris-style fit in your bag — making the most of the space you have, minus the bulk.

FASHION + FLAVOUR

Inspired by life's golden moments, Butter Yellow's rich, decadent tone radiates warmth and comfort — reminiscent of slow mornings and gentle sunshine.

A statement-maker made for the keepers of beautiful things.
